title: This NotebookLM feature cuts my workload by 50%
summary: NotebookLM's mind map feature generates visual hierarchies of topics and subtopics from uploaded sources, enabling users to selectively focus on relevant sections and skip irrelevant content. The feature reduces workload by eliminating the need to scan entire documents before identifying useful material.
